creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Thu, Mar 17, 2011 at 11:30:13PM +0000, Zack Dannar wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR kern/155442; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Zack Dannar <zdannar@gmail.com>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, zackdannar@yahoo.com
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: kern/155442: [bge] bge driver is seen but does not respond to
>  networking requests
> Date: Thu, 17 Mar 2011 17:22:14 -0600
> 
>  John,
>  
>  You were correct, after pulling down the new version of the patch I
>  was able to directly apply it to 8.1.  Thanks.
>  
>  
>  
>  
>  
>  John and yongari,
>  
>  In summary, I have tested the patch against 8.1 and 8.2 and both
>  versions appear to be working correctly.  When will a new build be
>  available with the patch already applied for me to verify on a clean
>  install or upgrade?
>  

Next official release(8.3-RELEASE) will include the patch once John
commit the patch to tree.

John, would you commit the patch?

>  Thanks.
